name: gpatch
summary: Assemble contigs into a chromosome-scalse pseudo-assembly using alignments to a reference sequence. Download the github repository for helper scripts to automate GPatch workflows, identify and correct misjoins in the contig assembly, produce dot-plots of patched pseudoassemblies to a reference assembly, and generate chrom.sizes and liftover chains for patched pseudoassemblies.
author: Adam Diehl
